headline: Arista Networks (ANET) Announces Agreement For New Optics Module
summary: Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) is one of the AI Stocks That Will Skyrocket. Networking solutions and services provider Arista Networks (NYSE:ANET) announced on the 12th that it had formed a new agreement to form a new optics module. Called the XPO, this module is capable of 12.8 Tbps of throughput and 204.8 Tbps of throughput per […]

headline: Arista’s Liquid‑Cooled AI Optics Push Might Change The Case For Investing In Arista Networks (ANET)
summary: On March 12, 2026, Arista Networks announced a new multi-source agreement for its XPO 12.8 Tbps liquid-cooled optics module, designed to support AI-focused data center fabrics with higher rack density, broad standards compatibility, and flexible interface architectures. This move highlights how thermal management and dense, open Ethernet-based optics are becoming core requirements for scaling next-generation AI networking infrastructure. Next, we’ll examine how Arista’s XPO liquid-cooled...
